dbm.dumb/gdbm/nextkey.name: nextkey
dbm.dumb/gdbm/nextkey.description: Returns the key that follows key in the traversal. The following code prints every key in the database db, without having to create a list in memory that contains them all: k = db.firstkey() while k is not None: print(k) k = db.nextkey(k)
